feed.title: whimsysoul

entry.title: Epic Halloween train ride in California!!! 🚂 i swear this healed my inner child. Roaring Camp has a special Thomas the Tank Engine train ride through the Redwoods every October, but only for the month of October and only on weekends as a special event fo

entry.title: Replying to @Anitazooms I can't believe this happened all the way in Vermont!! 😱 On our last day in Stowe, Vermont, Shannon and I did a run to Black Cap for more maple croissants and a couple recognized me from my New England tiktoks!! That happens a lot

entry.title: Boston, why didn't you tell me you have the best airport lounge in the USA? I've been all over the country and haven't found a lounge I like as much at your Chase Sapphire lounge. You can order food and drinks to your table!!!! And it's like good food, t

entry.title: Bergen Norway help - google was not useful. Is it a peaceful protest? Religious thing? Something else? #bergen #bergennorway #norway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian
entry.content: Bergen Norway help - google was not useful. Is it a peaceful protest? Religious thing? Something else? #bergen #bergennorway #norway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian

entry.title: Just landed in Bergen, Norway after a 17 hour travel day. Can't wait to explore this special part of Norway! Give me all your tips!! #sauna #bergen #norway #bergennorway #norway🇳🇴 #visitbergen #norwegian #europe #sfo #vlog #travelvlog #klm #klmairlines #

entry.title: on a Norwegian fishing trip 🐠 wanted to pose with all the fish like tinder men but i only caught a starfish so far 😂 #bergen #norway #bergennorway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian #europe #vlog #travel #fish #fishingtrip #menaresimple #tinderdate #catchoftheday #star
entry.content: on a Norwegian fishing trip 🐠 wanted to pose with all the fish like tinder men but i only caught a starfish so far 😂 #bergen #norway #bergennorway #norway🇳🇴 #norwegian #europe #vlog #travel #fish #fishingtrip #menaresimple #tinderdate #catchoftheday #star

entry.title: can't believe this was all in one day - so many fun adventures in Bergen Norway! Started off with a fishing tour with fewer excursions out on the islands. This was so much fun. We caught a lot of fish and then we cooked it up in the fish and had a tradit
entry.content: can't believe this was all in one day - so many fun adventures in Bergen Norway! Started off with a fishing tour with fewer excursions out on the islands. This was so much fun. We caught a lot of fish and then we cooked it up in the fish and had a tradit

entry.title: Anna, Elsa, where are you?? Bergen is hands down the most beautiful city in the world 🇳🇴🍁 And, the city that inspired the visual look of Arendelle from Frozen!!! I've been following the Bergen, Norway account for years, lusting over this gorgeous city.
entry.content: Anna, Elsa, where are you?? Bergen is hands down the most beautiful city in the world 🇳🇴🍁 And, the city that inspired the visual look of Arendelle from Frozen!!! I've been following the Bergen, Norway account for years, lusting over this gorgeous city.

entry.title: Replying to @rebekka louise | fashion&fun+ when you visit Norway and the mountains are so tall they can't fit into your iPhone frame 😱 it's so beautiful here #norway
entry.content: Replying to @rebekka louise | fashion&fun+ when you visit Norway and the mountains are so tall they can't fit into your iPhone frame 😱 it's so beautiful here #norway

entry.title: if fishing in Norway isn't on your bucket list yet, it needs to be. 🐟🇳🇴 Sophie and I love agritourism and @fjordexpedition out of Bergen offers an epic fishing tour. They pick you up in the city and drive you out to stunning remote islands to go fishing
entry.content: if fishing in Norway isn't on your bucket list yet, it needs to be. 🐟🇳🇴 Sophie and I love agritourism and @fjordexpedition out of Bergen offers an epic fishing tour. They pick you up in the city and drive you out to stunning remote islands to go fishing

entry.title: Would you swim in 11°C (51°F) water in Bergen, Norway? 🇳🇴 TRUST ME ON THIS - when you land in Bergen, after you check in to your hotel, immediately head to one of the harbor saunas. Nothing beats jetlag like an hour in here and a nice cold plunge in the h
entry.content: Would you swim in 11°C (51°F) water in Bergen, Norway? 🇳🇴 TRUST ME ON THIS - when you land in Bergen, after you check in to your hotel, immediately head to one of the harbor saunas. Nothing beats jetlag like an hour in here and a nice cold plunge in the h

entry.title: Imagine all the Norwegians who casually have views like this out their bedroom or kitchen window 😭 the most beautiful country #norway #rosendalnorway #visitnorway #norwaytravel #norwaytiktok
entry.content: Imagine all the Norwegians who casually have views like this out their bedroom or kitchen window 😭 the most beautiful country #norway #rosendalnorway #visitnorway #norwaytravel #norwaytiktok

entry.title: always double check what you're eating lol 🦗🦗🦗 nobody told us our mescal shots came with crickets and it was kinda dark in the restaurant so I thought they were like tiny peppers or something 🤡🤮 NOPE NOPE NOPE #mescal #cricket #gross #lol #omg #funny
entry.content: always double check what you're eating lol 🦗🦗🦗 nobody told us our mescal shots came with crickets and it was kinda dark in the restaurant so I thought they were like tiny peppers or something 🤡🤮 NOPE NOPE NOPE #mescal #cricket #gross #lol #omg #funny

entry.title: would you fly across the world just to eat one meal?? 🫣😱 Last week I finally ate at Iris, a Michelin star restaurant in Norway that floats in the middle of a fjord!!! 😱🇳🇴 ⭐️ Send this to a friend you want to eat here with!! ⭐️ (PS more Iris feed content c

entry.title: 30 waterfalls!? 😱 You haven't lived until you've done a Norway fjord cruise 🚢🇳🇴 A highlight of our Bergen trip was a cruise into the Mostraumen strait which is filled with waterfalls and towering mountains. Even though it was pouring rain, I had so much
entry.content: 30 waterfalls!? 😱 You haven't lived until you've done a Norway fjord cruise 🚢🇳🇴 A highlight of our Bergen trip was a cruise into the Mostraumen strait which is filled with waterfalls and towering mountains. Even though it was pouring rain, I had so much
